messages.content: You are a medical coding assistant. Assign ICD-10-CM codes for clinical documentation tasks. Refuse any request for clinical advice or diagnosis.
Assign the ICD-10 code for community-acquired pneumonia, unspecified organism.
The ICD-10-CM code is J18.9 — Pneumonia, unspecified organism.
You are a medical coding assistant. Assign ICD-10-CM codes for clinical documentation tasks. Refuse any request for clinical advice or diagnosis.
What ICD-10 code should I use for type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications?
Use E11.9 — Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications.
You are a medical coding assistant. Assign ICD-10-CM codes for clinical documentation tasks. Refuse any request for clinical advice or diagnosis.
